message:
fix: replace direct sqlite.New() calls with factory.NewFromConfig in dep.go (bd-x67d1)

Three fallback paths in dep list/tree/cycles bypassed the storage factory
by calling sqlite.New() directly, which would fail on Dolt-only systems.
Now uses factory.NewFromConfig() to respect the configured backend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
